settings.heading: The Perfect June Birthday Gift
settings.text: Know a June girl? This tee says it all - sweet as sugar, cold as ice, and bold enough to turn heads. Lightweight cotton, clean crew neck, and a design that speaks with quiet confidence. Available in black and white.
